context: Evaluates the use of crypto-browserify's createHmac API to generate HMAC authentication codes. The solution should correctly use createHmac with the secret key, then call update() and digest().

checklist.name: Uses createHmac
checklist.description: The solution calls createHmac(algorithm, secret) from crypto-browserify to create an HMAC object, passing both the algorithm and secret key.

checklist.name: Calls update()
checklist.description: The solution calls hmac.update(message) to feed the input message to the HMAC object.

checklist.name: Calls digest()
checklist.description: The solution calls hmac.digest(encoding) to finalize and return the HMAC in the requested encoding.

checklist.name: Correct default encoding
checklist.description: When no encoding argument is specified, the solution defaults to 'hex' encoding.
